channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: G7 summit hot mic moments: Meloni quits smoking, Trump gets a bike, Macron loses his watch
item.description: Leaders at the G7 summit naturally turned to the World Cup in their off-the-record conversations.

item.title: SpaceX surpasses Amazon's market cap on third day of public trading
item.description: Elon Musk has earned more today than Warren Buffett has in his entire career.

item.title: SpaceX's surging stock funds $60 billion Cursor acquisition in hours, revealing Musk's new power
item.description: SpaceX's stock appreciated by the entire $60 billion price of Cursor in hours on its first trading day, showing Elon Musk's influence.

item.title: Welcome to the summer of 'Butter Yellow,' the shade of consumer anxiety
item.description: Soft palettes, nostalgic spending, and what America's newest aesthetic obsession reveals about the economy underneath.
